title: Fabroxy
description: The Fabric mod for forwarding to Minecraft server proxy like Velocity, BungeeCord and Waterfall
body:
# Fabroxy The Fabric mod for forwarding to Minecraft server proxy like Velocity ## Requirements * [Minecraft](https://www.minecraft.net) * [Fabric Loader](https://fabricmc.net) * [Fabric API](/mod/fabric-api) A version that fits each requirement is written together in the Changelog. ## Supports * [Velocity](https://papermc.io/software/velocity) * ~~BungeeCord~~ *(not supported yet)* * ~~Waterfall~~ *(not supported yet)* ## Setting up ### Setting up with Velocity The common usage is almost the same as setting up a proxy on [Paper](https://docs.papermc.io/paper/reference/global-configuration#velocity). #### Velocity Server 1. Open `velocity.toml`. 1. Change the value of `player-info-forwarding-mode` to `"modern"` and save it. 1. Open `forwarding.secret` and remember its value. #### Fabric Server 1. Start your server to create a new Fabroxy config. 1. Open `server.properties` in your server directory. 1. Change the value of `online-mode` to `false` and save it. 1. Open `config/fabroxy.json`. 1. Change the value `enabled` to `true` and `secret` to the value `forwarding.secret` you just rememered. 1. Save it and enter `proxy reload` in your Fabric server console. ## Configuration | Name | Type | Default
Value | Description | |---|---|---|---| | enabled | boolean | `false` | Enable Fabroxy's Velocity proxy features. | | secret | string | `""` | A HMacSHA256 encryption key to communicate with the Velocity proxy. It should be match the contents of the file `forwarding.secret` on the Velocity proxy server. | | direct_connection | boolean | `false` | Allow clients to connect to the Fabric server without connecting the Velocity server. | ## Notes The mod file name indicates the mod name, loader and version: \ Fabroxy-`mod loader`-`MC version`-`mod version`.jar For example: \ Fabroxy-fabric-1.19.3-1.0.0.jar
